item.title: The Rolling Stones
item.description: Era1962–present (primary period: 1968–1972)GenresBritish bluesBlues rockRock & rollRoots rockSceneLondon (Richmond, then Soho)ListenRYM·Apple Music·Spotify Keith Richards plays behind the beat.

item.title: Blues
item.description: Periodc. 1890s–presentNamedc. 1912, with the first published “blues” sheet musicGeographic originAfrican American communities of the U.S.

item.title: Soul

item.title: Rock & roll
item.description: PeriodMid-1950s–early 1960sLocationMemphis, New Orleans, Chicago, New YorkInfluencesRhythm & bluesCountryGospelBoogie woogiePlaylistROLLLinksRYM The sound of convergence.
